title: Roasted Australian Pumpkin Casserole
description: A comforting, charred Australian dish featuring roasted pumpkin, perfect for a sick day, with anti-inflammatory properties, served in a tagliere vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the pumpkin cubes with olive oil, salt, and black pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the pumpkin mixture on a baking sheet and roast for 30 minutes, or until charred and tender.
In a large skillet, saute the garlic and onion until softened.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the brine and feta cheese.
In a tagliere vessel, create a layer of roasted pumpkin, followed by a layer of the garlic and onion mixture, and finally a layer of the brine and feta cheese mixture.
Repeat the layering process until all ingredients are used, ending with a layer of pumpkin on top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
